title: ReviewStatus
description: Enum contract for the governance review status of a record, plus transition metadata. Reusable enum contract, not a stored data instance — no instances are committed to the repo. Storage-agnostic; other schemas reference `#/$defs/ReviewStatus`. See docs/GOVERNANCE_STATES.md and docs/STATE_TRANSITIONS.md.

previous_status.description: The prior review status, for transition tracking.

reason.description: Reason for the current status (required in practice for `rejected`, `superseded`, `archived`).

reviewed_by.description: Anonymized actor who set the status. Human review is required to reach reviewed/approved states.

reviewed_at.description: ISO-8601 timestamp of the review action.

ReviewStatus.description: Allowed review status values. Agent-generated records must default to `draft` or `needs_review`; only humans may reach `consultant_reviewed` and beyond.
